seo.title: Software Engineer Resume Examples & ATS Templates 2026
seo.description: Learn how to write a perfect Software Engineer resume that passes the ATS. Discover the top keywords, common mistakes, and view a complete 100/100 resume example.
seo.keywords: software engineer resume, software developer resume, software engineering resume template, ats resume
seo.ogTitle: How to Write a Software Engineer Resume in 2026
seo.ogDescription: Steal our exact resume template that landed roles at Google, Amazon, and Microsoft.

hero.title: Software Engineer Resume Examples
hero.description: Stop getting auto-rejected by the ATS. Here is the exact resume structure, keywords, and action verbs you need to land interviews in 2026.

mistakes: Using outdated technologies or frameworks (e.g., Flash, AngularJS).
Listing generic skills without context (e.g., just writing 'Team player' instead of 'Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver a high-traffic e-commerce platform').
Failing to highlight achievements (e.g., 'Wrote clean, modular code' instead of 'Improved code quality by 30% through rigorous testing and refactoring, resulting in a 25% reduction in bugs').
tips: Always include a link to your GitHub profile to showcase your coding skills.
Use action verbs like 'Designed', 'Developed', 'Deployed', and 'Optimized' to describe your experience.
Quantify your achievements by using numbers and statistics (e.g., 'Increased application performance by 40% through caching and optimization').

exampleResume.name: Emily Chen
exampleResume.title: Software Engineer
exampleResume.summary: Highly motivated Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in developing scalable, efficient, and reliable software systems. Proven track record of delivering high-quality products using Agile methodologies and cloud-based technologies.

bullets: Led the development of a cloud-based e-commerce platform using Java, Spring Boot, and AWS, resulting in a 50% increase in sales revenue.
Designed and implemented a microservices architecture using Docker, Kubernetes, and Apache Kafka, improving system scalability and reliability by 30%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver a high-traffic mobile application using React Native, Node.js, and MongoDB, with a 4.5-star rating on the App Store.
Developed a real-time analytics platform using Python, Apache Spark, and Apache Cassandra, processing 100,000+ events per second.
Optimized database queries using SQL and indexing, improving query performance by 25%.

exampleResume.skills: Java, Python, C++, JavaScript, Cloud Computing (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud), Agile Development, Scrum Master, Containerization (Docker), Microservices Architecture, Machine Learning (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
